hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); r=re.search(r'git\s+(checkout\s+-[bB]|switch\s+-c)',cmd); sys.stdout.write(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'Forbidden: creating new branches is not allowed. Work only on existing branches (fix/business-logic-audit or claude/*).'}) + '\n') if r else sys.exit(0)"
